problem id: 66f9fe57
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(1) OR SHR(6)) AND ROT(4)

examples:
  10011000 -> 00000000
  01111011 -> 10110111
  01001100 -> 10000000
  11000110 -> 00001100
  10101110 -> 01001010
  10110011 -> 00100010
  00011100 -> 00000000

query: 00010110
predicted answer: 00100000
